description: A button that scrolls the user back to the top of the page, displayed as an icon button with an upward chevron.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard back to top button with upward chevron icon

notes: The icon inside uses Font Awesome classes (fas fa-angle-up fa-2x) which are rendered via the global CSS. The aria-label is always 'Scroll to top of page' across all sampled pages — provided as a prop with that default. The button has no visible text label, only the icon.
